rationale: The ftsDefaultColumn.spec.js already has 7 tests covering the core happy path (TC-FTS-001), user field toggle (TC-FTS-002), re-resolution on new search (TC-FTS-003), reset filters (TC-FTS-004), SQL mode (TC-FTS-005), close column (TC-FTS-006), and no injection over user fields (TC-FTS-007). Two behaviors from the wiring map remain uncovered by E2E: (1) stream change clears isFtsDefaultColumn and re-resolves FTS for the new stream, (2) the field reset sidebar button clears isFtsDefaultColumn. Extend the existing spec with 2 new P1 tests (TC-FTS-008, TC-FTS-009). No registration needed — the spec is already in playwright.yml under Logs-Core.
